# Vendored: @freeq/sdk

Plain copy of `freeq-sdk-js` from the wumblr-freeq monorepo (not published to npm).

- Source: /Users/dave/Documents/attps/wumblr-freeq/freeq-sdk-js (github attpslabs/wumblr-freeq)

then `pnpm --filter @freeq/sdk build`.
